text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wow, way to kill the mood!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I mean, usually you'd be more... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait... You seem kinda down in the<n>dumps...
Something happen?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Figured you'd say that! But<n>unfortunately for
you, I can't just leave<n>you alone now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead... lay it on me. If there's<n>something I
can do for you, I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...The school store ran out of yakisoba<n>dogs.
